gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/ 9)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ لَمْ يُوَقِّرْ كَبِيرَنَا وَ يَرْحَمْ صَغِيرَنَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He is not from us, the one who does not revere (respect) our elderly and being merciful to our young ones’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad in a marfu’ manner from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever does not consider our elders as dignified and does not show kindness to our people who are yet to grow up, is not from our people.”
